title: Version 2.0.15 Changelog
items: Add script to rotate file encryption keys
Add progress indicator for upload scan, deletion and restoration
Show deleted folders in a single list on trash page
Fix file location info in info modal
Fix stale search cache and bleed
Show share/star buttons in Shared/Starred page
Aggregate MIME security logs to prevent spamming logs
Add finalizing state for uploads progress UI
Collapse OnlyOffice and Share Base URL settings sections
Auto fetch new release changelogs and tags for wiki
